Agent.description: Represents an agent in the database.

cluster_name.description: Name of the cluster the agent belongs to.

created_at.description: Timestamp when the agent was created.

deleted_at.description: Timestamp for soft deletion, if applicable.

last_heartbeat.description: Timestamp of the last heartbeat received from the agent.

updated_at.description: Timestamp when the agent was last updated.

AgentAnnotation.description: Represents an agent annotation in the database.

agent_id.description: ID of the agent this annotation belongs to.

key.description: Key of the annotation (max 64 characters, no whitespace).

value.description: Value of the annotation (max 64 characters, no whitespace).

AgentEvent.description: Represents an agent event in the database.

agent_id.description: ID of the agent associated with this event.

created_at.description: Timestamp when the event was created.

deleted_at.description: Timestamp for soft deletion, if applicable.

deployment_object_id.description: ID of the deployment object associated with this event.

message.description: Optional message providing additional details about the event.

updated_at.description: Timestamp when the event was last updated.

AgentLabel.description: Represents an agent label in the database.

agent_id.description: ID of the agent this label is associated with.

id.description: Unique identifier for the agent label.

label.description: The label text (max 64 characters, no whitespace).

AgentTarget.description: Represents an agent target in the database.

agent_id.description: ID of the agent associated with this target.

id.description: Unique identifier for the agent target.

stack_id.description: ID of the stack associated with this target.

AuditLog.description: An audit log record from the database.

actor_id.description: ID of the actor (NULL for system or unauthenticated).

actor_type.description: Type of actor: admin, agent, generator, system.

id.description: Unique identifier for the log entry.

resource_id.description: ID of the affected resource (NULL if not applicable).

AuditLogListResponse.description: Response structure for audit log list operations.

total.description: Total count of matching entries (for pagination).

AuthResponse.description: Represents the response structure for authentication information.

admin.description: Indicates if the authenticated entity is an admin.

agent.description: The string representation of the agent's UUID, if applicable.

generator.description: The string representation of the generator's UUID, if applicable.

ConfigChangeInfo.description: Information about a single configuration change.

new_value.description: The new value (as a string representation).

old_value.description: The previous value (as a string representation).

ConfigReloadResponse.description: Response structure for configuration reload operations.

changes.description: List of configuration changes detected during reload.

reloaded_at.description: Timestamp when the configuration was reloaded.

success.description: Indicates whether the reload was successful.

CreateAgentResponse.description:
Response body for [`create_agent`]: the newly-created agent plus the
one-time initial PAK shown only at creation.

CreateDeploymentObjectRequest.description:
Wire DTO for creating a deployment object via the public API.

Distinct from [`brokkr_models::models::deployment_objects::NewDeploymentObject`],
which carries server-derived fields (e.g. `yaml_checksum`).

CreateDiagnosticRequest.description: Request body for creating a diagnostic request.

agent_id.description: The agent that should handle this request.

retention_minutes.description: How long the request should be retained in minutes (default 60, max 1440).

CreateGeneratorResponse.description: Response for a successful generator creation or PAK rotation.

pak.description: The Pre-Authentication Key for the generator.

DeploymentHealth.description: Represents a deployment health record in the database.

agent_id.description: ID of the agent that reported this health status.

checked_at.description: Timestamp when the agent last checked health.

created_at.description: Timestamp when the record was created.

deployment_object_id.description: ID of the deployment object this health status applies to.

id.description: Unique identifier for the health record.

status.description: Health status: healthy, degraded, failing, or unknown.

summary.description: JSON-encoded summary with pod counts, conditions, and resource details.

updated_at.description: Timestamp when the record was last updated.

DeploymentHealthResponse.description: Response for deployment object health query.

health_records.description: List of health records from different agents.

overall_status.description: Overall status (worst status across all agents).

DeploymentObject.description: Represents a deployment object in the database.

created_at.description: Timestamp when the deployment object was created.

deleted_at.description: Timestamp for soft deletion, if applicable.

id.description: Unique identifier for the deployment object.

is_deletion_marker.description: Indicates if this object marks a deletion.

stack_id.description: ID of the stack this deployment object belongs to.

submitted_at.description: Timestamp when the deployment was submitted.

updated_at.description: Timestamp when the deployment object was last updated.

yaml_checksum.description: SHA-256 checksum of the YAML content.

DeploymentObjectHealthSummary.description: Summary of health for a deployment object within a stack.

status.description: Overall status for this deployment object.

DeploymentObjectHealthUpdate.description: Health update for a single deployment object.

status.description: Health status: healthy, degraded, failing, or unknown.

DiagnosticRequest.description: A diagnostic request record from the database.

agent_id.description: The agent that should handle this request.

claimed_at.description: When the agent claimed the request.

deployment_object_id.description: The deployment object to gather diagnostics for.

expires_at.description: When the request expires and should be cleaned up.

id.description: Unique identifier for the diagnostic request.

requested_by.description: Who requested the diagnostics (e.g., operator username).

status.description: Status: pending, claimed, completed, failed, expired.

DiagnosticResponse.description: Response containing a diagnostic request with optional result.

DiagnosticResult.description: A diagnostic result record from the database.

collected_at.description: When the diagnostics were collected by the agent.

created_at.description: When the result was created in the database.

id.description: Unique identifier for the diagnostic result.

request_id.description: The diagnostic request this result belongs to.

ErrorResponse.description: Wire format for every 4xx/5xx response body in the v1 API.

details.description:
Optional structured context. Keys and value shapes are documented per
error code when present.

message.description: Human-readable message; not stable and may change between versions.

Generator.description: Represents a generator in the Brokkr system.

created_at.description: Timestamp of when the generator was created.

deleted_at.description: Timestamp of when the generator was deleted, if applicable.

is_active.description: Indicates whether the generator is currently active.

last_active_at.description: Timestamp of when the generator was last active.

updated_at.description: Timestamp of when the generator was last updated.

HealthStatusUpdate.description: Request body for updating health status from an agent.

deployment_objects.description: List of deployment object health updates.

conditions.description: List of detected problematic conditions (e.g., ImagePullBackOff).

pods_ready.description: Number of pods in ready state.

NewAgent.description: Represents a new agent to be inserted into the database.

cluster_name.description: Name of the cluster the agent belongs to.

NewAgentAnnotation.description: Represents a new agent annotation to be inserted into the database.

agent_id.description: ID of the agent this annotation belongs to.

key.description: Key of the annotation (max 64 characters, no whitespace).

value.description: Value of the annotation (max 64 characters, no whitespace).

NewAgentEvent.description: Represents a new agent event to be inserted into the database.

agent_id.description: ID of the agent associated with this event.

deployment_object_id.description: ID of the deployment object associated with this event.

message.description: Optional message providing additional details about the event.

NewAgentLabel.description: Represents a new agent label to be inserted into the database.

agent_id.description: ID of the agent this label is associated with.

label.description: The label text (max 64 characters, no whitespace).

NewAgentTarget.description: Represents a new agent target to be inserted into the database.

agent_id.description: ID of the agent to associate with a stack.

stack_id.description: ID of the stack to associate with an agent.

NewDeploymentObject.description: Represents a new deployment object to be inserted into the database.

is_deletion_marker.description: Indicates if this object marks a deletion.

stack_id.description: ID of the stack this deployment object belongs to.

yaml_checksum.description: SHA-256 checksum of the YAML content.

NewGenerator.description: Represents the data required to create a new generator.

description.description: Optional description of the new generator.

NewStack.description: Represents a new stack to be inserted into the database.

NewStackAnnotation.description: Represents a new stack annotation to be inserted into the database.

key.description: Key of the annotation (max 64 characters, no whitespace).

stack_id.description: ID of the stack this annotation belongs to.

value.description: Value of the annotation (max 64 characters, no whitespace).

NewStackLabel.description: Represents a new stack label to be inserted into the database.

label.description: The label text (max 64 characters, no whitespace).

stack_id.description: ID of the stack this label is associated with.

NewStackTemplate.description: Represents a new stack template to be inserted into the database.

generator_id.description: Generator ID - NULL for system templates (admin-only).

NewTemplateAnnotation.description: Represents a new template annotation to be inserted into the database.

key.description: The annotation key (max 64 characters, no whitespace).

template_id.description: ID of the template this annotation is associated with.

value.description: The annotation value (max 64 characters, no whitespace).

NewTemplateLabel.description: Represents a new template label to be inserted into the database.

label.description: The label text (max 64 characters, no whitespace).

template_id.description: ID of the template this label is associated with.

ResourceHealth.description: Health status for an individual Kubernetes resource.

effective_retention_seconds.description: Effective retention window for the stack. <= ceiling.

long_term_sink_hint.description:
Recommended sink for long-term centralisation. Brokkr is NOT a
log warehouse — see project_log_retention_stance.

oldest_available_ts.description:
Server-side timestamp of the oldest row currently retained for
this stack, or null when no rows exist in the window.

retention_ceiling_seconds.description: Hard upper bound on retention. Never exceeds 21600 (6h).

Stack.description: Represents a stack in the database.

created_at.description: Timestamp when the stack was created.

deleted_at.description: Timestamp for soft deletion, if applicable.

updated_at.description: Timestamp when the stack was last updated.

StackAnnotation.description: Represents a stack annotation in the database.

key.description: Key of the annotation (max 64 characters, no whitespace).

stack_id.description: ID of the stack this annotation belongs to.

value.description: Value of the annotation (max 64 characters, no whitespace).

StackLabel.description: Represents a stack label in the database.

id.description: Unique identifier for the stack label.

label.description: The label text (max 64 characters, no whitespace).

stack_id.description: ID of the stack this label is associated with.

StackTemplate.description: Represents a stack template in the database.

created_at.description: Timestamp when the template was created.

deleted_at.description: Timestamp for soft deletion, if applicable.

generator_id.description: Generator ID - NULL for system templates (admin-only).

updated_at.description: Timestamp when the template was last updated.

SubmitDiagnosticResult.description: Request body for submitting diagnostic results.

TemplateAnnotation.description: Represents a template annotation in the database.

created_at.description: Timestamp when the annotation was created.

id.description: Unique identifier for the template annotation.

key.description: The annotation key (max 64 characters, no whitespace).

template_id.description: ID of the template this annotation is associated with.

value.description: The annotation value (max 64 characters, no whitespace).

TemplateLabel.description: Represents a template label in the database.

created_at.description: Timestamp when the label was created.

id.description: Unique identifier for the template label.

label.description: The label text (max 64 characters, no whitespace).

template_id.description: ID of the template this label is associated with.

WebhookDelivery.description: A webhook delivery record from the database.

acquired_by.description: Agent ID that acquired this delivery (NULL = broker).

acquired_until.description: TTL for the acquisition - release if exceeded.

completed_at.description: When the delivery completed (success or dead).

last_attempt_at.description: When the last delivery attempt was made.

last_error.description: Error message from last failed attempt.

status.description: Delivery status: pending, acquired, success, failed, dead.

subscription_id.description: The subscription this delivery belongs to.

target_labels.description: Labels for delivery targeting (copied from subscription).

WebhookSubscription.description: A webhook subscription record from the database.

event_types.description: Event types to subscribe to (supports wildcards like "deployment.*").

target_labels.description: Labels for delivery targeting (NULL = broker delivers).

updated_at.description: When the subscription was last updated.

WorkOrder.description: Represents an active work order in the queue.

backoff_seconds.description: Base backoff seconds for exponential retry calculation.

claim_timeout_seconds.description: Seconds before a claimed work order is considered stale.

claimed_at.description: Timestamp when the work order was claimed.

claimed_by.description: ID of the agent that claimed this work order (if any).

created_at.description: Timestamp when the work order was created.

id.description: Unique identifier for the work order.

last_error.description: Most recent error message from failed execution attempt.

last_error_at.description: Timestamp of the most recent failure.

next_retry_after.description: Timestamp when RETRY_PENDING work order becomes PENDING again.

status.description: Queue status: PENDING, CLAIMED, or RETRY_PENDING.

updated_at.description: Timestamp when the work order was last updated.

yaml_content.description: Multi-document YAML content (e.g., Build + WorkOrder definitions).

WorkOrderLog.description: Represents a completed work order in the audit log.

claimed_at.description: Timestamp when the work order was claimed.

claimed_by.description: ID of the agent that executed this work order.

completed_at.description: Timestamp when the work order completed.

created_at.description: Timestamp when the work order was created.

result_message.description: Result message (image digest on success, error details on failure).

retries_attempted.description: Number of retry attempts before completion.

live_subscribers.description: Aggregated live-subscriber count across all stacks (WS-11).

get.description:
Returns audit log entries matching the specified filters, ordered by
timestamp descending (most recent first).

# Authentication

Requires admin PAK authentication.

# Query Parameters

- `actor_type`: Filter by actor type (admin, agent, generator, system).
- `actor_id`: Filter by actor UUID.
- `action`: Filter by action (exact match or prefix with *).
- `resource_type`: Filter by resource type.
- `resource_id`: Filter by resource UUID.
- `from`: Filter by start time (inclusive).
- `to`: Filter by end time (exclusive).
- `limit`: Maximum results (default 100, max 1000).
- `offset`: Number of results to skip.

# Returns

- `200 OK`: List of audit logs with pagination info.
- `401 UNAUTHORIZED`: Missing or invalid authentication.
- `403 FORBIDDEN`: Authenticated but not an admin.
- `500 INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR`: Database error.

parameters.description: Filter by actor type (admin, agent, generator, system).
parameters.name: actor_type

parameters.description: Filter by action (exact match or prefix with *).
parameters.name: action

get.summary: Lists audit logs with optional filtering and pagination.

post.description:
This endpoint triggers a hot-reload of configurable settings without
requiring a broker restart. Only settings marked as "dynamic" can be
reloaded; static settings (like database URL) require a restart.

# Authentication

Requires admin PAK authentication.

# Returns

- `200 OK`: Configuration reloaded successfully with list of changes.
- `401 UNAUTHORIZED`: Missing or invalid authentication.
- `403 FORBIDDEN`: Authenticated but not an admin.
- `500 INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR`: Failed to reload configuration.
post.summary: Reloads the broker configuration from disk.
